---
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE
#
#   1. Copy this file:
#        cp projects/new-project-template.qmd projects/your-project.qmd
#   2. Fill in all the EDIT HERE sections below
#   3. Add an entry to projects.json (set featured: false
#      unless you want it on the homepage)
#   4. Run: quarto render
#
# That's it. No other files to touch.
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# EDIT: browser tab title
pagetitle: "Project Title — Yash Tiwari"
page-layout: custom
# Navbar is injected from the shared partial (no edits needed there)
include-before-body: ../_partials/case-study-template.html
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     CASE STUDY BANNER
     EDIT every field below.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="case-banner">

  <a href="../projects.html" class="back-link">
    <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <line x1="19" y1="12" x2="5" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 19 5 12 12 5"/>
    </svg>
    All Projects
  </a>

  <!-- EDIT: short category label, e.g. "Analytics · ML" -->
  <div class="case-tag">Analytics · ML</div>

  <!-- EDIT: project title -->
  <h1 class="case-title">Your Project Title</h1>

  <!-- EDIT: one compelling sentence about what you built and why it mattered -->
  <p class="case-subtitle">
    One sentence — what you built and why it mattered.
  </p>

  <!-- EDIT: four fact fields shown as a metadata row -->
  <div class="case-meta-row">
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Timeline</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">Month Year – Month Year</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Role</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">Your Role</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Stack</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">Python · SQL · Tool</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-meta-item">
      <span class="case-meta-key">Outcome</span>
      <span class="case-meta-val">Key metric or result</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
<!-- ── END BANNER ── -->


<!-- Open case body — markdown sections below render inside this div -->
<div class="case-body">
```

## Overview

Write normally in markdown here. No HTML needed. Just prose.
Quarto renders it inside the `.case-body` div automatically.

## Problem

Describe the problem you were solving.

## Approach

- Use bullet points freely
- They render correctly
- No class names needed

## Results

```{=html}
<!-- EDIT: three stat cards — headline numbers for this project -->
<div class="result-grid">
  <div class="result-card">
    <span class="result-num">00%</span>
    <span class="result-label">What this number means</span>
  </div>
  <div class="result-card">
    <span class="result-num">00×</span>
    <span class="result-label">What this number means</span>
  </div>
  <div class="result-card">
    <span class="result-num">000</span>
    <span class="result-label">What this number means</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

Add narrative context here in prose after the stat cards.

## Learnings

Optional section. Delete if not needed.

```{=html}
</div><!-- /case-body -->

<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Copied to clipboard</div>
```
